samples.gvd:
module pe (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [31:0] a,
    input [31:0] b,
    output reg [31:0] c
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        
        c <= 32'b0;
    end else begin
        
        c <= c + (a * b);
    end
end
endmodule

samples.gvd:
module width_8to16 (
    input 				   clk,
    input 				   rst_n,
    input				      valid_in,
    input	   [7:0]		   data_in,
    output	reg			valid_out,
    output   reg [15:0]	data_out
);

reg [7:0] data_lock;
reg flag;
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		data_out <= 16'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(valid_in && flag) begin
			data_out <= {data_lock,data_in};
		end
	end
end
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		valid_out <= 1'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(flag) begin
			valid_out <= 1'b1;
		end
		else begin
			valid_out <= 1'b0;
		end
	end
end
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		flag <= 1'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(valid_in) begin
			flag <= ~flag;
		end
	end
end
always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
	if(!rst_n) begin
		data_lock <= 8'b0;
	end
	else begin
		if(valid_in && !flag) begin
			data_lock <= data_in;
		end
	end
end
endmodule

samples.gvd:
module counter_12 (
    input rst_n,
    input clk,
    input valid_count,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    
    if (!rst_n) begin
        
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end 
    
    else if (valid_count) begin
        
        if (out == 4'd11) begin
            
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end 
        
        else begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end
end
endmodule

samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect #(
    parameter s0 = 2'b00,
    parameter s1 = 2'b01,
    parameter s2 = 2'b10,
    parameter s3 = 2'b11
) (
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input data_in,
    output reg data_out
);

reg [1:0] state, next_state;
always@(posedge clk,negedge rst_n)begin
	if(!rst_n)begin
		state<=s0;
	end
	else begin
		state<=next_state;
	end
end
always@(*)begin
	case(state)
	s0:begin
		if(data_in==0)begin
			next_state=s1;
		end
		else begin
			next_state=s0;
		end
	end
	s1:begin
		if(data_in==1)begin
			next_state=s2;
		end
		else begin
			next_state=s1;
		end
	end
	s2:begin
		if(data_in==0)begin
			next_state=s3;
		end
		else begin
			next_state=s0;
		end
	end
	s3:begin
		if(data_in==1)begin
			next_state=s2;
		end
		else begin
			next_state=s1;
		end
	end
	default:begin
		next_state=s0;
	end
	endcase
end
always@(*)begin
	data_out=(state==s2)&&(data_in==0)?1:0;
end
endmodule

samples.gvd:
module sequence_detector #(
    parameter IDLE = 5'b00001,
    parameter S1   = 5'b00010,
    parameter S2   = 5'b00100,
    parameter S3   = 5'b01000,
    parameter S4   = 5'b10000
) (
    input  clk,
    input  rst_n,
    input  data_in,
    output sequence_detected
);

    reg [4:0] current_state;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            current_state <= IDLE;
        end else begin
            case (current_state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        current_state <= S1;
                    end
                end
                S1: begin
                    if (data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        current_state <= S2;
                    end else begin
                        current_state <= IDLE;
                    end
                end
                S2: begin
                    if (data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        current_state <= S3;
                    end else begin
                        current_state <= IDLE;
                    end
                end
                S3: begin
                    if (data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        current_state <= S4;
                    end else begin
                        current_state <= IDLE;
                    end
                end
                S4: begin
                    
                end
            endcase
        end
    end

    assign sequence_detected = (current_state == S4) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

endmodule
